meta.description: Verbatim original question text extracted from the text layer of "2023 Driving test 1.pdf". Answers inherited from the English master qbank (some PDF-staged answers are wrong). Mapped 1:1 to master by question number; master questions not present in this PDF fall back to English.

q0001.prompt: When braking on a muddy road, the tires can easily spin or drift and cause traffic accidents.

q0002.prompt: When a vehicle runs on an expressway at the speed of 100 kilometers per hour, its safe distance from the vehicle in front is not less than 100 meters.

q0003.prompt: A vehicle running on an expressway may frequently change lanes.

q0004.prompt: When a vehicle changes lane, the driver should turn on the turn signal in advance,observe traffic conditions, maintain a safe distance and move into the new lane.

q0005.prompt: When an accident has caused congestion on an expressway, the vehicles may run in the emergency strip on the right or in the shoulder of the road.

q0006.prompt: After a vehicle enters a mountain road, it should pay special attention to the continuous curves sign. In addition, it should voluntarily evade vehicles and pedestrians, reduce speed in a time manner and honk in advance.

q0007.prompt: When passing a dangerous section of a mountain road, especially by the locations of frequent occurrence of landslides, mudslides, the driver should drive with care and avoid stopping.

q0008.prompt: In the course of reversing, the driver should move slowly, observe the conditions on both sides and in the rear and be ready to stop anytime.

q0009.prompt: In a vehicle that has safety belts, the driver should request the passengers to buckle up.

q0010.prompt: A vehicle is not allowed to make a U turn on the ramp of an expressway.

q0011.prompt: When passing a section of a mountain road which is prone to landside and mudflow, the driver should not stop.

q0012.prompt: The three principles for careful driving are concentration, careful observation and early prevention.

q0013.prompt: When a vehicle changes lane, the driver should turn on the turn signal and rapidly enter the new lane.

q0014.prompt: If a vehicle may encounter a vehicle coming in the opposite direction in the course of overtaking, the driver should speed up in advance and overtake.

q0015.prompt: When a vehicle stops for a long time, the driver should select a car park to do so.

q0016.prompt: When a vehicle passes a school or a residential area, the driver should observe the signs and markings, go slowly and refrain from honking.

q0017.prompt: When driving at night, the driver should reduce speed and go forward if the vehicle coming in the opposite direction fails to turn off the high beam light. This is designed to prevent an accident from happening when there are pedestrians crossing the place where the lights of the two vehicles meet.

q0018.prompt: When a driver suddenly encounters a vehicle in the opposite direction that forces its way by overtaking and occupying his lane, the driver may refuse to avoid it and force it to yield to you.

q0019.prompt: When crossing each other on a narrow road, the driver should slow down, yield and stop first.

q0020.prompt: If discovering pedestrians abruptly cross the road while driving, the driver should immediately reduce speed and evade.

q0021.prompt: When there’s a diversion traffic control on the expressway, a driver can stop by the side to wait instead of leaving out of the expressway, for continually running after the traffic control.

q0022.prompt: When driving in a snowy day, the driver should drive along the vehicle tracks if there are any.

q0023.prompt: After a tire blows out and before the driver can control the speed of the vehicle, he should refrain from using the foot brake to stop the vehicle. Otherwise, a horizontal swing of the vehicle can cause greater danger.

q0024.prompt: When driving in icy and snowy weather, light reflection from the accumulated snow can easily make a driver feel dizzy and have an illusion.

q0025.prompt: When passing through an overflowing road, a high gear should be used to pass rapidly.

q0026.prompt: When a vehicle passes a tunnel, it is prohibited from overtaking.

q0027.prompt: When a vehicle passes a level crossing, the driver should use the low gear to pass and should not change gear halfway in order to avoid engine kill.

q0028.prompt: When bicycles ahead obstruct the traffic flow, the driver may honk to remind them, speed up and bypass.

q0029.prompt: A driver should stop on the expressway at once to have a rest when he feel tired.

q0030.prompt: When a vehicle goes down a long slope, it should run at a lower gear and fully use the engine to brake.

q0031.prompt: As the traffic flow at an interchange is generally one-way, the vehicles do not have to reduce speed when passing.

q0032.prompt: When the vehicles cross each other at night, the driver may continuous change lights to remind the vehicle coming in the opposite direction and at the same should reduce speed and go forward or stop on the right side.

q0033.prompt: When driving in a heavy rain, the driver should control the speed to avoid the danger arising from water slide.

q0034.prompt: When driving, the driver should be courteous and defensive, instead of being offensive.

q0035.prompt: When a vehicle passes a level crossing, it is prohibited from overtaking.

q0036.prompt: When a vehicle runs on an expressway, the driver may ascertain the speed according to his feeling.
